title: hemerocallis dumortieri var. exaltata
intro: Hemerocallis dumortieri var. exaltata, also known as the tall daylily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hemerocallis genus and is native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hemerocallis dumortieri var. exaltata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
